instruction: In /home/user/project_hard, count total lines from all .php files recursively, excluding any path under vendor/ and any file ending with .test.php. Save the exact result as TOTAL=<number> into /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt, and also print the same line in terminal.

command: import pyautogui, time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl','alt','t'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command: ok=1; [ -f /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt ] || ok=0; val=$(cat /home/user/project_hard/php_line_total.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$val" = "TOTAL=9" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
